legacy.content:
# Phase 48-01 Plan: Release-Ready Text Graphics Polish
## Objective
Deliver a cohesive text-graphics visual pass for KAPLAY without media assets.
## Tasks
1. Polish text iconography and tone usage for room/context/action states. 2. Standardize panel rhythm (padding, divider spacing, title/subtitle scales). 3. Improve event/journal readability (line wrapping and emphasis strategy). 4. Add a lightweight visual regression capture process for KAPLAY scenes. 5. Publish release notes for UI polish and known follow-ups.
## Verification
- Build standalone artifact and smoke through all primary scenes. - Confirm deterministic behavior is unchanged via parity smoke.
